zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Brixton Sevenoak於1500年之後出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特比特明斯特時，她的父親Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV8492歲，母親Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton8490歲。她和Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1572年8月31日在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Brixton Sevenoak于1500年之后出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特比特明斯特时，她的父亲Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV8492岁，母亲Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton8490岁。她和Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1572年8月31日在她的家乡，埋葬在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Sevenoak
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Senneck
meanings: English: a Dorset variant of   Sevenoaks  , from the old pronunciation of the place-name. There is no evidence to connect it with Savernake (Wilts).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Brixton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from an unidentified place. The place name seems to be composed of the genitive case of the Old English personal name Bracc + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Use as a given name has been influenced by the popularity of names such as Brant and Branton , and the adoption as given names of similar‐sounding surnames such as Caxton and Paxton .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Brixton Sevenoak was born after 1500, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV, was 8492 and her mother, Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton, was 8490. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster. She died on 31 August 1572, in her hometown, and was buried in Pitminster, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Brixton Sevenoak est née après 1500, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV, avait 8492 ans et sa mère, Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton, avait 8490 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster. Elle est décédée le 31 août 1572, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Brixton Sevenoak nach 1500 in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV 8492 und ihre Mutter Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton 8490. Sie hatte mit Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. August 1572 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Pitminster, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Brixton Sevenoak è nata il dopo il 1500 nel Pitminster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV, aveva 8492 anni e sua madre, Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton, aveva 8490 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster. Morì il 31 agosto 1572, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Pitminster, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Brixton Sevenoakが1500年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターで生まれた時，父Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IVは8492歳，母Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixtonは8490歳であった。彼女はNicholas Gaylord of Pitminsterとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1572年8月31日に故郷で死去し，イギリスソメルセトピトミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Brixton Sevenoak(이)가 1500년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV(은)는 8492세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton(은)는 8490세였다. 그녀는 Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 8월 31일 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Brixton Sevenoak nasceu após 1500, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV, tinha 8492 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton, tinha 8490 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster. Ela faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1572, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Brixton Sevenoak родилась после 1500 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV было 8492 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton, 8490. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster. Она умерла 31 августа 1572 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Brixton Sevenoak nació después de 1500, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Newman John Brixton of SEVENOAK IV, tenía 8492 años y su mamá, Lady Joanna Alwyn Gaylord Brixton, tenía 8490 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Nicholas Gaylord of Pitminster. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1572, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra.
